name: Gingerbread Drops
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Coat two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
Beat the egg, brown sugar, molasses, and oil together in an electric mixer until smooth.
Add the buttermilk and beat again.
Add the flour, wheat germ, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, and salt; beat until well mixed.
Stir in the raisins.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter about 2 inches apart onto the cookie sheets.
Bake for 12 to 14 minutes, or until lightly browned. Cool on wire racks. Repeat with remaining batter.
